title: TurkStat Poultry Statistics — animals by type, and slaughtered/meat production quantity
time_coverage: historical annual run through latest available year
units: head counts and metric tons, described in file
notes: Path in the veriportali.tuik.gov.tr statistical-themes tree: Agriculture > Livestock > Poultry > Tables and Graphics. Same signed-download-URL mechanism as CPI/GDP datasets in this source (see turkstat/cpi/manifest.json notes).
